subcodes.first_line: O thou who art assured by the signs of God! Yield not to grief and distress, neither give way to lamentation and weeping. Rend not thy face, nor let tears stream from thine eyes [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای موقنهٴ بآیات اللّه جزع و فزع منما و گریه و زاری مکن روی مخراش و سرشک چشم گریان
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @spiritual transformation, @consolation and comfort, @soul; spirit after death
